name: Parametric Table
description: Parametric dining/work table with customizable dimensions, leg style, and stretchers
author: RhinoClaw

components.name: Table
components.code:
#! python3
import Rhino.Geometry as rg
import math

tw = float(TableW)
td = float(TableD)
th = float(TableH)
top_t = float(TopT)
leg_w = float(LegW)
leg_d = float(LegD)
leg_inset = float(LegInset)
leg_taper = float(LegTaper)
apron_h = float(ApronH)
apron_t = float(ApronT)
overhang = float(TopOverhang)

hw = tw / 2.0
hd = td / 2.0
breps = []

# ========== TABLE TOP ==========
# Rounded rectangle top
top_z = th
top_box = rg.Box(
    rg.Plane.WorldXY,
    rg.Interval(-hw, hw),
    rg.Interval(-hd, hd),
    rg.Interval(top_z - top_t, top_z)
)
tb = top_box.ToBrep()
if tb:
    breps.append(tb)

# ========== LEGS ==========
# Leg positions (inset from top edges)
frame_hw = hw - overhang
frame_hd = hd - overhang

leg_positions = [
    (-frame_hw + leg_inset + leg_w/2, -frame_hd + leg_inset + leg_d/2),
    ( frame_hw - leg_inset - leg_w/2, -frame_hd + leg_inset + leg_d/2),
    (-frame_hw + leg_inset + leg_w/2,  frame_hd - leg_inset - leg_d/2),
    ( frame_hw - leg_inset - leg_w/2,  frame_hd - leg_inset - leg_d/2),
]

apron_bottom = top_z - top_t - apron_h
leg_top_z = top_z - top_t

for lx, ly in leg_positions:
    # Tapered leg: wider at top, narrower at bottom
    top_hw = leg_w / 2.0
    top_hd = leg_d / 2.0
    bot_hw = top_hw * leg_taper
    bot_hd = top_hd * leg_taper
    
    # Top profile
    top_pts = [
        rg.Point3d(lx - top_hw, ly - top_hd, leg_top_z),
        rg.Point3d(lx + top_hw, ly - top_hd, leg_top_z),
        rg.Point3d(lx + top_hw, ly + top_hd, leg_top_z),
        rg.Point3d(lx - top_hw, ly + top_hd, leg_top_z),
        rg.Point3d(lx - top_hw, ly - top_hd, leg_top_z),
    ]
    # Bottom profile
    bot_pts = [
        rg.Point3d(lx - bot_hw, ly - bot_hd, 0),
        rg.Point3d(lx + bot_hw, ly - bot_hd, 0),
        rg.Point3d(lx + bot_hw, ly + bot_hd, 0),
        rg.Point3d(lx - bot_hw, ly + bot_hd, 0),
        rg.Point3d(lx - bot_hw, ly - bot_hd, 0),
    ]
    
    top_crv = rg.Polyline(top_pts).ToNurbsCurve()
    bot_crv = rg.Polyline(bot_pts).ToNurbsCurve()
    
    loft = rg.Brep.CreateFromLoft([bot_crv, top_crv], rg.Point3d.Unset, rg.Point3d.Unset, rg.LoftType.Straight, False)
    if loft:
        parts = list(loft)
        # Cap top and bottom
        top_cap = rg.Brep.CreatePlanarBreps(top_crv, 0.01)
        bot_cap = rg.Brep.CreatePlanarBreps(bot_crv, 0.01)
        if top_cap:
            parts.extend(list(top_cap))
        if bot_cap:
            parts.extend(list(bot_cap))
        joined = rg.Brep.JoinBreps(parts, 0.1)
        if joined:
            breps.extend(list(joined))
        else:
            breps.extend(parts)

# ========== APRONS (Zargen) ==========
if apron_h > 0:
    az_top = leg_top_z
    az_bot = az_top - apron_h
    
    # Front apron
    lx0 = leg_positions[0][0] + leg_w/2
    lx1 = leg_positions[1][0] - leg_w/2
    y_f = -frame_hd + leg_inset + leg_d/2 - leg_d/2
    apron_f = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
        rg.Interval(lx0, lx1),
        rg.Interval(y_f, y_f + apron_t),
        rg.Interval(az_bot, az_top))
    af = apron_f.ToBrep()
    if af: breps.append(af)
    
    # Back apron
    y_b = frame_hd - leg_inset - leg_d/2 + leg_d/2 - apron_t
    apron_b = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
        rg.Interval(lx0, lx1),
        rg.Interval(y_b, y_b + apron_t),
        rg.Interval(az_bot, az_top))
    ab = apron_b.ToBrep()
    if ab: breps.append(ab)
    
    # Left apron
    ly0 = leg_positions[0][1] + leg_d/2
    ly1 = leg_positions[2][1] - leg_d/2
    x_l = -frame_hw + leg_inset + leg_w/2 - leg_w/2
    apron_l = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
        rg.Interval(x_l, x_l + apron_t),
        rg.Interval(ly0, ly1),
        rg.Interval(az_bot, az_top))
    al = apron_l.ToBrep()
    if al: breps.append(al)
    
    # Right apron
    x_r = frame_hw - leg_inset - leg_w/2 + leg_w/2 - apron_t
    apron_r = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
        rg.Interval(x_r, x_r + apron_t),
        rg.Interval(ly0, ly1),
        rg.Interval(az_bot, az_top))
    ar = apron_r.ToBrep()
    if ar: breps.append(ar)

a = breps
